prompt: Create a chaotic playful editorial poster based on a funny ultra-wide candid selfie aesthetic, mixing raw flash photography, hand-drawn doodles, and Gen Z meme-poster energy. Main concept: A close-up exaggerated selfie portrait of a stylish young person making a chaotic funny face under a green tent or canopy, surrounded by rough doodle illustrations and handwritten captions. The design should feel spontaneous, hilarious, expressive, and intentionally unpolished, like a real candid photo turned into a meme-editorial poster. Main subject: Feature a young person in an extreme close-up wide-angle selfie crop, centered and very close to the camera. The face should appear slightly exaggerated from the lens perspective, with playful distortion around the nose, mouth, and cheeks. The subject wears a casual blue jacket or windbreaker and looks energetic, weird, and funny in an intentional way. Pose and behaviour: The subject makes a dramatic silly expression: one eye squeezed shut, nose scrunched, mouth open with teeth visible, lips pulled to one side, like a chaotic “rawr” face. The head is very close to the camera, creating strong perspective distortion. The pose should feel spontaneous, candid, and meme-worthy. Expression: Funny, chaotic, playful, unhinged but harmless, expressive, unserious, and intentionally awkward. The mood should feel like “current mood: still not normal.” Environment: Set the portrait under a green outdoor tent or canopy, with visible metal frame lines in the background. The environment should feel casual, slightly messy, and realistic, like an outdoor event snapshot taken with direct flash. Graphic doodles: Add hand-drawn doodles around the subject using white, yellow, red, orange, and light blue marker-style lines: - cat ears drawn above the head - white whiskers on the cheeks - a rough white outline around the face and body - handwritten text "RAWR!" in red on the left - handwritten text "NOPE, STILL NOT NORMAL" on the upper-right - small yellow stars - arrows and underline marks - handwritten label "CURRENT MOOD" near the lower-right - a cartoon green monster or dinosaur doodle on the left side, breathing a small orange flame toward the subject - loose squiggle lines and motion marks Composition: Keep the subject huge and central, filling most of the frame. Place doodle text and monster illustration around the face without covering the main facial expression. The green tent background should remain visible and recognizable. Typography: Use rough handwritten marker lettering, uneven and casual. The text should feel like someone doodled directly on top of the photo. Keep the words readable but imperfect. Color palette: - Deep green tent background - Blue jacket - Warm natural skin tones - White doodle outlines - Red "RAWR!" text - Yellow stars and highlights - Orange flame accents - Light blue small doodle accents Lighting and finish: Use direct flash selfie lighting, strong highlights on the face, casual iPhone-style sharpness, slight lens distortion, realistic skin texture, and raw snapshot energy. Add subtle grain and printed-photo texture, but keep the face clear. Style: Chaotic Gen Z selfie editorial, doodle meme poster, candid flash photography, funny internet-core design, scrapbook annotation style, playful monster doodle aesthetic. Design principles: Preserve the funny facial expression as the main focal point, keep doodles expressive but not too cluttered, maintain readable handwritten captions, and make the final image feel spontaneous, weird, fun, and editorial. Negative prompt: No messy anatomy, no extra fingers, no distorted teeth beyond natural wide-angle exaggeration, no scary horror mood, no gore, no aggressive violence, no low-quality face, no unreadable handwriting, no overcluttered doodles, no polished luxury fashion mood, no corporate poster style, no random unrelated stickers, no hair control. Aspect ratio: 3:4
